story: The mycology class collected specimens from the university forest. Students identified each mushroom using dichotomous keys in their field guides. Forty-seven specimens were collected and cataloged. The instructor checked each identification. A list was compiled of the species found and their preferred habitats. Students prepared spore prints and observed the spores under a microscope. The data was recorded in the laboratory notebook. All specimens were properly labeled and stored according to protocol. A summary of the findings was shared with the department.
